zh.South Warnborough, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾素斯 瓦恩波洛
zh.Oxford, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾奧可福德
zh.Christchurch, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾可利斯丘其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry White於1478年出生在英國哈普爾可利斯丘其時，他的父親Robert White24歲，母親Margaret Gaynsford21歲。他於1501年之前與Elizabeth Fenrother在英國哈普爾可利斯丘其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1539年在英國哈普爾可利斯丘其享年61歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾奧可福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry White于1478年出生在英国哈普爾可利斯丘其时，他的父亲Robert White24岁，母亲Margaret Gaynsford21岁。他于1501年之前与Elizabeth Fenrother在英国哈普爾可利斯丘其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1539年在英国哈普爾可利斯丘其享年61岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾奧可福德。

nameMeanings.name: White
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: Whitty
meanings: topographic name denoting a ‘dweller by the white hedge or the white (forest) enclosure’, from Middle English whit ‘white’ (Old English hwīt) + heie ‘hedge, enclosure’ (Old English (ge)hæg and Old French haie) perhaps in reference to whitethorn (hawthorn) hedging. This English name has been recorded in Ireland (Wexford) since the 13th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Faoite, see also White .
nickname from Middle English whit ‘white’ + eie ‘eye’ (Old English hwīt + ēage). Compare Blackie 2 and Greeney .
variant of   Witty  , with which this surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Whitson
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Whiteson, literally ‘white son’ or perhaps ‘son of someone named White ’. Occasionally, a variant of Whiston .

variants.name: Whitt
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): variant of   White  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Witt  .

variants.name: McQuitty
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhaoitigh, a patronymic from a Gaelicization of English White . See also McWhite .

variants.name: Whitecotton
meanings: Apparently a compound of   White   +   Cotton  , but the history is obscure.

variants.name: McElwain
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Bháin (Irish) or Mac Gille Bháin (Scottish) ‘son of the fair-haired lad’, often translated into English as White or Whyte but otherwise indistinguishable, once Anglicized, from Scottish Gaelic Mac Gille Bheathain in 2 below. Compare Kilbane .
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Bheathain ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Beathan’, a personal name representing a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare McBain .

variants.name: McWhite
meanings: Irish: partly translated Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Faoitigh, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of English White .

variants.name: Wight
meanings: Scottish and English: nickname from Middle English wiht, wight ‘agile, nimble, strong, brave’ (Old Norse víg with the Old Norse neuter suffix -t, for which compare the word scant), or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht. Possibly sometimes a nickname from Middle English wight ‘living creature; small portion or thing’, or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht.

English: habitational name from the Isle of Wight. The island is recorded as Vectis (its Latin name) c. 150 AD . Its name derives from a British word, perhaps related to Welsh gwaith ‘turn, course’, meaning ‘place of the division’, in reference to the island's position in the Solent.
English and Scottish: variant of   White  .

variants.name: Whites
meanings: English: variant of White with genitive or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Whitman
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Whytman (Old English Hwītmann, from hwīt ‘white’ + mann ‘man’). Compare White 1 and also Wightman , with which this surname was probably confused.
History: John Whitman settled in Weymouth, MA, c. 1638. The poet Walt Whitman (1819–92) was descended from Joseph Whitman, who had settled in Stratford, CT, from England around 1660.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry White was born in 1478, in Christchurch, Hampshire, England, his father, Robert White, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Gaynsford, was 21. He married Elizabeth Fenrother before 1501, in Christchurch, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1539, in Christchurch, Hampshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry White est né en 1478, à Christchurch, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert White, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gaynsford, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Fenrother avant 1501, à Christchurch, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1539, à Christchurch, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry White 1478 in Christchurch, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert White 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Gaynsford 21. Er hat vor 1501 in Christchurch, Hampshire, England Elizabeth Fenrother geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1539 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Christchurch, Hampshire, England und wurde in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry White è nato il nel 1478 nel Christchurch, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Robert White, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Gaynsford, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Fenrother prima del 1501, nel Christchurch, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1539, nel Christchurch, Hampshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Oxford, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Whiteが1478年にイギリスハンプシュアイアチリストチャーチで生まれた時，父Robert Whiteは24歳，母Margaret Gaynsfordは21歳であった。1501年以前にイギリスハンプシュアイアチリストチャーチでElizabeth Fenrotherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1539年にイギリスハンプシュアイアチリストチャーチで61歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry White(이)가 1478년 영국 함프실르 크리스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert White(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Gaynsford(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1501년 이전 영국 함프실르 크리스트c후르치에서 Elizabeth Fenrother(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1539년 영국 함프실르 크리스트c후르치에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry White nasceu em 1478, em Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert White, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Gaynsford, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Fenrother antes 1501, em Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1539, em Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry White родился в 1478 г. в местности крисчурч, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert White было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gaynsford, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fenrother перед 1501 г. в местности крисчурч, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1539 г. в местности крисчурч, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry White nació en 1478, en Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert White, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Gaynsford, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Fenrother antes de 1501, en Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1539, en Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
